headline: Polygon PoS Bridge identified as official Ethereum-Polygon asset transfer protocol; core bridge contract addresses not discovered
short_headline: Polygon PoS Bridge; addresses not found

findings.text: No block explorer name-tag search results returned for 'Polygon Bridge' on Etherscan, Polygonscan, or other explorers
Official deployments documentation page not located; docs.polygon.technology lacks centralized deployed contracts reference
No audit links provided in context; none discovered via protocol website
No GitHub repository recorded; protocol.github is null
Protocol chain field lists only 'Polygon' but bridge is cross-chain (Ethereum ↔ Polygon); canonical bridge addresses on both chains required
Factory discovery not applicable; bridge does not use factory pattern
No admin/governance addresses confirmed; StateSender contracts identified (0x28e4F3a7f651294B9564800b2D01f35189A5bFbE on Ethereum) but bridge proxy admin unknown
No traced addresses meet ratchet integrity requirements due to lack of definitive source URLs

rationale.verdict: Protocol is identified as the official Polygon PoS Bridge for Ethereum ↔ Polygon asset transfers, but zero core bridge contract addresses were discovered from official sources (deployments doc, GitHub, audits, or block explorers). The address_book is null and no specification page lists the deployed bridge proxy addresses on Ethereum mainnet or Polygon mainnet. Protocol metadata cannot be populated without contract addresses. Ratchet will inherit this discovery run but downstream slices (control, ability-to-exit, etc.) cannot proceed without address discovery.

evidence.shows: Polygon official website; mentions Portal for bridging but no contract addresses listed
Polygon Portal described as official trustless two-way bridge between Polygon PoS and Ethereum
StateSender contract addresses: 0x49E307Fa5a58ff1834E0F8a60eB2a9609E6A5F50 (Sepolia), 0x28e4F3a7f651294B9564800b2D01f35189A5bFbE (Ethereum Mainnet); bridge proxy contract addresses not provided
Bridge overview page reached but rendered as generic PoS section without specific contract addresses

unknowns: D1-offchain: Etherscan, Polygonscan, and canonical block explorers returned no name-tagged bridge contract addresses for 'Polygon Bridge' or 'PolygonZkEVMBridge'
D2-offchain: No canonical deployed contracts specification page located at docs.polygon.technology; bridge contract address list not found
D3-offchain: No audit links provided or discovered for Polygon PoS Bridge
D4: protocol.github is null; no source repository identified
D5: Protocol chain field specifies only 'Polygon' but Polygon Bridge is cross-chain (Ethereum ↔ Polygon PoS); discovery required on both chain explorers
D7: Bridge proxy admin, proxy addresses, and governance multisig addresses on Ethereum mainnet and Polygon mainnet not identified
D8: No addressed surfaces with definitive sourced URLs to populate admin_addresses[]

protocol_metadata.about: The Polygon Portal is the official trustless two-way bridge between Polygon PoS and Ethereum. It enables users to transfer tokens (ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155) from Ethereum mainnet to the Polygon PoS chain and back without third-party risk. The bridge uses lock-mint and burn-unlock mechanisms with Merkle proofs for verification. It is accessible via the Polygon Portal web interface and supports both mainnet and Amoy testnet.
